alignments.json_text: What? I don't think so.
alignments.wiki_text: What!? I don't think so.

alignments.json_text: No.
alignments.wiki_text: No.
alignments.proposed_text: No.

alignments.json_text: Mr. You can shove it because I don't know what you're talking about.
alignments.wiki_text: Mister, you better shove it, because I don't know what you're talking about.
alignments.proposed_text: Mister, you better shove it, because I don't know what you're talking about.

alignments.json_text: I don't know what the hell you're saying.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't know what the hell you're sayin'!
alignments.proposed_text: I don't know what the hell you're sayin'!

alignments.json_text: I don't know what in the world.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't know what in the world...
alignments.proposed_text: I don't know what in the world.

alignments.json_text: They're full of something.
alignments.wiki_text: You're full of, uh... Something. I don't know what. '[beep]'
alignments.proposed_text: They're full of something.

alignments.json_text: I don't know what.

alignments.proposed_text: I don't know what.

alignments.json_text: Shut up.
alignments.wiki_text: Shut up! Goddamnit, tell '[beep]' me what my name is...
alignments.proposed_text: Shut up.

alignments.json_text: Goddammit, tell me what my name is.
alignments.wiki_text: Shut up! Goddamnit, tell '[beep]' me what my name is...
alignments.proposed_text: Goddammit, tell me what my name is.

alignments.json_text: No, it is not.
alignments.wiki_text: No, it is not. I'm trying '[beep]' to tell you--
alignments.proposed_text: No, it is not.

alignments.json_text: Now I'm trying to tell you it.
alignments.wiki_text: No, it is not. I'm trying '[beep]' to tell you--
alignments.proposed_text: Now I'm trying to tell you it.

alignments.json_text: I did know such a goddamn thing.
alignments.wiki_text: I did no such a goddamn thing.
alignments.proposed_text: I did no such a goddamn thing.

alignments.json_text: Well, you dirty rotten bastard, I tell you I didn't order anything and you can't tell me my name.
alignments.wiki_text: Why, you dirty rotten bastard! I tell you I didn't order anything and you can't tell me my name, so hang up and '[beep]' shut up!
alignments.proposed_text: Well, you dirty rotten bastard, I tell you I didn't order anything and you can't tell me my name.

alignments.json_text: So hang up and shut up.
alignments.wiki_text: Why, you dirty rotten bastard! I tell you I didn't order anything and you can't tell me my name, so hang up and '[beep]' shut up!
alignments.proposed_text: So hang up and shut up.

alignments.json_text: I said hang up and shut up.
alignments.wiki_text: I said, hang up and shut up!
alignments.proposed_text: I said hang up and shut up.

alignments.json_text: Oh, shut up.
alignments.wiki_text: Oh, shut up.
alignments.proposed_text: Oh, shut up.

alignments.json_text: What package?
alignments.wiki_text: What package?
alignments.proposed_text: What package?

alignments.json_text: Oh, I didn't get any lums.
alignments.wiki_text: No... I didn't get any lambs.
alignments.proposed_text: No... I didn't get any lambs.

alignments.json_text: Oh, so you didn't hear that.
alignments.wiki_text: Alrigh', so you didn't hear that?
alignments.proposed_text: Alrigh', so you didn't hear that?

alignments.json_text: I don't want no lams because I don't know what kind of lans they are.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't want no lambs. Because! I don't know what kind of lambs they are.
alignments.proposed_text: I don't want no lambs. Because! I don't know what kind of lambs they are.

alignments.json_text: And arreos, man.

alignments.json_text: Adios to whatever.

alignments.json_text: I don't care.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't care.
alignments.proposed_text: I don't care.

alignments.json_text: Thanks for darling.
